s: A new RSS reader for selfoss (http://selfoss.aditu.de/)
d:
A new RSS reader for selfoss. What it does:
  • Fetches read, unread, and favorite feeds.
  • Marking as read, marking as favorite.
  • Manage selfoss sources from the app.
  • Add an RSS feed from within the app, or by sharing a link from your browser.
  • Choose between multiple light and dark themes.
PS: It only works with Selfoss
